headline: Malta Unveils DeFi Rules Under MiCA Framework

article.title: Malta proposes DeFi rulebook covering DAOs under MiCA-era framework
article.summary: The Maltese regulator is seeking industry feedback on a legal framework for software-governed organizations, arguing that many DeFi projects are not fully decentralized.

headline: Bitcoin Surges, Eyes $60K Amid Tech Sector Decoupling

article.title: Bitcoin decouples from tech stocks: Is $60K BTC’s next stop?
article.summary: Bitcoin’s slump accelerated as capital rotated further into the AI sector, raising the odds of a BTC price drop below $60,000.

headline: Oil Plunges 7% on Hormuz Shipping Rebound

article.title: Oil Set for Deep Weekly Loss as Hormuz Traffic Starts to Pick Up
article.summary: Oil headed for a substantial weekly drop as the US-Iran interim peace deal saw shipping through the Strait of Hormuz start to return to normal, easing the global crude market’s biggest ever supply shock.

headline: KPMG Australia Faces $100M Fallout Amid Parliament Probe

article.title: KPMG Australia Scandal Heats Up With Reckoning in Parliament
article.summary: KPMG Australia is set for a public reckoning as lawmakers demand information and changes in an industry beset by a series of scandals around the misuse of confidential client information.

headline: China's Z.AI Launches GLM-5.2, Threatens $2B Nvidia Dominance

article.summary: Strategy's preferred STRC stock closed again under $90 for the second consecutive day at $88.59, having drifted as low as $82.50.

headline: Bitcoin Microtransactions Surge to 80% of Daily Volume

article.title: CryptoQuant says bitcoin microtransactions now make up 80% of daily transactions
article.summary: Bitcoin transactions below 0.01 BTC now make up about 80% of all daily transactions, up from about 44% in 2023, CryptoQuant said.
